allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT d.id, d.title, d.status, COUNT\(s.id\) as slides FROM decks d LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.\\"deckId\\" = d.id GROUP BY d.id, d.title, d.status ORDER BY slides DESC, d.\\"createdAt\\" DESC;")
Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT id, title, status, \\"createdAt\\" FROM projects ORDER BY \\"createdAt\\" DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, COUNT\(d.id\) decks FROM projects p LEFT JOIN decks d ON d.\\"projectId\\" = p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.\\"createdAt\\" DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, COUNT\(s.id\) slides FROM projects p LEFT JOIN decks d ON d.\\"projectId\\" = p.id LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.\\"deckId\\" = d.id WHERE p.status IN \('failed','completed'\) GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.\\"createdAt\\" DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status FROM projects p WHERE p.name ILIKE 'CYKEL%' OR p.name ILIKE 'cycle%' ORDER BY p.\\"createdAt\\" DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT d.id, d.title, d.status, COUNT\(s.id\) slides, d.\\"businessInfo\\" IS NOT NULL has_bi FROM decks d LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.\\"deckId\\"=d.id WHERE d.\\"projectId\\"='c504c25d-8cc7-462b-b14b-b52a8c59c2ab' GROUP BY d.id;")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('deckId:', d.get\('deckId'\), 'projectId:', d.get\('projectId'\)\)")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT e.type, e.x, e.y, e.width, e.height FROM slide_elements e JOIN slides s ON s.id=e.\\"slideId\\" JOIN decks d ON d.id=s.\\"deckId\\" WHERE d.\\"projectId\\"='c504c25d-8cc7-462b-b14b-b52a8c59c2ab' AND s.type='roadmap' ORDER BY e.\\"order\\";")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "UPDATE projects SET \\"businessInfo\\" = jsonb_set\(jsonb_set\(\\"businessInfo\\", '{logo}', '{}'::jsonb\), '{images}', '[]'::jsonb\) WHERE name='CYKEL' RETURNING id, name;")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "DELETE FROM slide_elements WHERE \\"slideId\\" IN \(SELECT s.id FROM slides s JOIN decks d ON d.id=s.\\"deckId\\" WHERE d.\\"projectId\\"='c504c25d-8cc7-462b-b14b-b52a8c59c2ab'\) AND \(type='image' AND content->>'src' LIKE '%picsum%' OR type='logo' AND content->>'src' LIKE '%picsum%'\) RETURNING type, content->>'src';")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "DELETE FROM slide_elements WHERE \\"slideId\\" IN \(SELECT s.id FROM slides s JOIN decks d ON d.id=s.\\"deckId\\" WHERE d.\\"projectId\\"='c504c25d-8cc7-462b-b14b-b52a8c59c2ab'\) AND content->>'src' LIKE '%picsum%';")

Bash(psql "postgresql://shadi@localhost:5432/pitchonix" -c "SELECT type, content->>'src' FROM slide_elements WHERE \\"slideId\\" IN \(SELECT s.id FROM slides s JOIN decks d ON d.id=s.\\"deckId\\" WHERE d.\\"projectId\\"='c504c25d-8cc7-462b-b14b-b52a8c59c2ab'\) AND \(type='image' OR type='logo'\);")
